{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un toh̅ Oritervs us winno
Gr:
Kalnu Seiru / lih̅s tam Klajn-
Gr: mam Waran / kas ( steepjahs )
lih̅s tai Tukfnibai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Un tee atgreeſahs/ un nah-
ze lih̅s tai Akkai Mispata / tas
irr Kahdes/ un apkawe wiſfu
Tecin/ to Ahmalekitern/ un ar-
tidsan to Ahmoritexu/ kas Aze-
zona Tamarā dsihwoja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Tad isgahje tas Kehninsch
no Sodomas/ un tas Kehninsch
no Gomorras/ un tas Kehninsch
no Ahdamas/ un tas Kehninsch
no Zebōima/ un tas Kehninsch
no Belas/ fchi irr Zoära/ un tai-
hjahs ar teem fautees/ eekfch tahs
Eelejas Siddim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Prett Kedarlaomoru to
Kehnixu no Elamas/ un Ttidea-
lu to Kehnixu to Tautn/ un Am-
rawelu to Kehnixu no Sincaras/
un Ahriofu/ to Kehnixu no Elaf-
faras : Tſchetr Kehnini prett
peezeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Un tai Eeleja Siddim bi-
ja dauds lihpaina Mahla Bed-
dres/ tad behdse tas Kehninsch
no Sodomas un Gomorras/ un
kritte tur / un tee atliffuschee
behdse Kalnōs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un tee nehme wiſfu So-
demas un Gomorras Mantu/
un wiſfu winnas Barribu/ un
gahje nohſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Un nehme arridsan Lattu
un winna Mantu/ Ahbrama
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Tad nahze weens/ kas b-
istmuzzis/ un pasazzija to Ahbra-
mam/ tam Ebreēam / kas dsih-
woja ſtarp teem Ohsoleem Main-
re/ ta Ahmoritera/ Efcola Brah-
ta/ un Ahnera Brahta/ kas Ah-
brama Derriua-Beedri bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Un Ahbrams dsirdeja fa-
wu Brahli effam Zeetuma ais-
westu/ tad apbruunnojahs/ winſc-
ar favu Saimi/ kas favā Nam-
mā peedsunmuscht/ trihsſimts un-
aſtonpadefinitis/un dsinnahs teem-
pakkat lih̅s Danei.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un dallijahs pretti teem
Nakti/ winſch un winna Kalpi/
un apkawe tohs / un dsinnahs-
teem pakkat lih̅s Obai/ kas Da-
masſufai pa kreifo Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un atwedde wiſfu Man-
tu atpakkat/ ka arridsan Lattu fa-
wu Brahli / un winna Mantu-
atwedde tas atpakkat / ir tahs-
Seewas un tohs Laudis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Tad isgahje tas Kehninsch
no Sodomas winnam pretti /
pehz winna Atgreeſchanas no-
tahs Kaufchanas/ prett Kedarla-
omoru/un prett teem Kehnineem/
kas ar to bijuschi lih̅s tai Eele-
jai Schawe / ta irr ta Kehnina
Eeleja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Un Melkisedeks/ tas Keh-
ninsch no Saleinas / netfe Matsi-
un Wihnu preeſcha/ un tas btja-
weens Preesteris ta wiſſinaug-
staka STIPRA DEEWA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Un tas fwehtija winau /
un
"
    }
  ],
